title: Create Immersed
description: A Modpack centered around the Create Mod, inspiring you to build awesome stuff in modded terrain
body:
# Create Immersed A modpack centered around the Create Mod mod, with completly new world generation in all dimensions and many options for decoration, farming and automation
This Modpack is based on my [Create Basics](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create_basics) Modpack, which itself is based on [Vanilla Augmented](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla_augmented), if you want a lighter modpack, check them out! ## Main Features * Technology, Transport and Automation
* New world generation in every dimension and many new items
* Expansion for Farming and cooking
* Additions to storage options
* Many blocks for building
Mod List #### !This list of mods is only applies to the newest published version! #### All the mods in [Create Basics](https://modrinth.com/modpack/create_basics) are included and not listed here for brevities sake. Look over there for all the feature mods or simple explore ingame! ### Extensions [Create: Extended Cogwheels](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-cogwheels) - Many more Cogwheel types
[Create: Bells & Whistles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bellsandwhistles) - More decoration blocks
[Expanded Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-delight) - Extending Farmer's Delight with more crops and functionality
[Festive Delight [Forge / Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/festive-delight) - Festive food for Farmer's Delight
### World Generation [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith) - Many new biomes using Vanilla Blocks
[Tectonic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic) - Changes how the terrain is shaped
[BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) - Complete overhaul of the Nether dimension
[BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) - Complete overhaul of the End dimension
### Decoration [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped) - Many fancy blocks
[Bits And Chisels](https://modrinth.com/mod/bits-and-chisels) - Small blocks
### Other [Extended Drawers](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers) - More options for mass-storage
[BCLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/bclib) - Library for the BetterX mods
[Athena](https://modrinth.com/mod/athena-ctm) - Library needed by Chipped
[Resourceful Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib) - Library needed by Chipped
### Planed to be added #### The Create version I am using is based on an older build, meaning some mods don't work, see this [Github Issue](https://github.com/Treetrain1/Create/issues/14) [Create: SandPaper Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-sandpaper-overhaul) - See above
[Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco) - See above
[ExtendedDrawersAddon](https://modrinth.com/mod/extendeddrawersaddon) - There was an issue launching when using this mod, haven't investigated further
